title: Synchronize finalizer with canonical release state
outOfScope: release metadata publication, tagging, and provider operations
adopter files and unrelated release checks

sources.reason: Predecessor source-reference correction and closure evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Update one canonical digest projection atomically with the release metadata finalizer; malformed state fails closed.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root-cause process correction before publication; no provider operation is in scope.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: finalize-release-freeze updates release-state.json metadataDigests.published to the exact generated release.json digest
Malformed or missing canonical release-state metadata fails closed before publication
Regression coverage proves synchronization and failure behavior
The complete Contract/Preflight/Finish/PR/merge/ai-close lifecycle is recorded before release is retried
guidelines: Update canonical projections atomically with the metadata they digest.
Fail closed on missing or malformed release-state evidence.
Do not publish or tag from this Work Item.

intent.problem: The release finalizer updates release.json but leaves release-state.json.metadataDigests.published stale, so the mandatory release-state consistency gate blocks the candidate after finalization.
constraints: This is the template repository, not an adopter project.
Repository rules require all default-branch changes through a PR.
Do not bypass release-state consistency or create a separate budget-only Work Item.
intent.rationale: Make the finalizer the single atomic writer for release.json and its canonical digest projection, then test the exact invariant before any provider publication.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

budgetImpact.reason: Measured budget growth belongs to this functional finalizer correction; no separate budget-only Work Item is created.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: valid release-state metadata digest is synchronized
missing or malformed release-state metadata fails closed
release publication remains out of scope until lifecycle closure
scenarioCoverage.reason: Provider publication is explicitly excluded from this corrective Work Item.

rawUserRequest: 发布前门禁发现 finalizer 未同步 canonical release-state；停止发布，修正根因流程后再继续。

declaredIntent.summary: Make release finalization update canonical release-state metadata digests atomically.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized root-cause release-process corrections and publication after verification.
